summary: Iteration 5 full-stack tests for Trabalengua Uniformes. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests pass covering Talca 7-product catalog, dynamic stock (min of pantalón/polerón), dual-decrement order flow, 400 on overflow, regression for Colegio Concepción (standard 4-product + single-product decrement), new products (polera_corta, polera_larga, delantal_cotona) ordering, and admin products endpoint. Frontend: 17/17 Playwright checks pass covering title, favicon, no-emergent-badge, header bg #F2F0E8, Bordados banner + navigation, Talca 7 product cards, Stock combinado badge, catalog-search-input, quick-index chips, chip-polar filtering, clear + reset-filters, and product-detail loading. Critical bug found and fixed during testing: Home.jsx used <Scissors> icon but did not import it from lucide-react, causing a hard ReferenceError on the home page render. Added Scissors to the lucide-react import.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx was missing the Scissors import from lucide-react while rendering <Scissors/> — caused a full-page runtime error. Fixed by the testing agent. Suggest a pre-commit/CI ESLint rule (react/jsx-no-undef) to catch undefined JSX identifiers; similar oversights can easily slip in when copy-pasting icon markup.

server.py is 757 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold. Consider extracting: seed/migration block, order-create handler, and admin image upload into dedicated modules (e.g., seed.py, orders.py, media.py).
apply_talca_buzo_dynamic_stock and get_talca_dynamic_buzo_sizes duplicate logic; extract a shared pure helper that takes the 3 product docs and returns dynamic sizes.

create_order mutates stock with two separate update_one calls (pant, polera) non-atomically — concurrent orders could oversell. Consider a single bulk_write or a transaction (MongoDB session) for Talca buzo_completo dual-decrement.

SchoolPage.jsx filter matches on type_key, which means searching 'polera' also catches polera_buzo (whose display name is 'Polerón de buzo'). Functionally acceptable, but UX-wise a user searching 'polerón' works too; consider stripping diacritics for broader matches.
seed_data_creation: Orders created during testing using prefix TEST_ in customer_name/email (TEST_Buyer, TEST_Overflow, TEST_Concepcion, TEST_polera_corta, TEST_polera_larga, TEST_delantal_cotona). These decrement stock in Mongo — if seed pristine stock is required later, re-seed the products collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL is https://trabalen-uniforms.preview.emergentagent.com (NOT talca-uniformes). Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and are pytest-based. Dynamic stock: buzo_completo.sizes[i].stock = min(pantalon_buzo[i], polera_buzo[i]); ordering Talca buzo_completo decrements BOTH, leaving buzo_completo's own stock values untouched but the API still reports them dynamically. Home.jsx Scissors import is now correct; verify it stays when future icons are added. If redoing order tests, note stock is now decremented by previous iteration — re-seed products collection or use fresh state for exact-value assertions.
rca_of_the_issue: Home.jsx rendered <Scissors size={20}/> inside the Bordados strip but only imported ArrowRight, Truck, ShieldCheck, Sparkles, Search, X from lucide-react. This produced 'ReferenceError: Scissors is not defined' on first render of '/', wiping the home page entirely. Reproduced by navigating to the home URL and observing the react-error-overlay. Mitigation applied: added Scissors to the lucide-react import. Reload verified no runtime error; bordados strip renders and navigates to /bordados.
